summary: Frontend testing attempted but React app is not rendering. The HTML loads correctly with proper title and meta tags, JavaScript bundle loads successfully, but React components are not mounting to the DOM.

critical_bugs.issue: React app not rendering - root div remains empty despite successful bundle loading
critical_bugs.impact: Complete application failure - no UI elements are visible
critical_bugs.details: HTML loads correctly, JavaScript bundle (2.5MB) loads successfully, but React.createRoot() is not mounting the app. Only HMR warning in console.

ui_bugs.issue: Blank white page displayed instead of ChurnGuard AI landing page

passed_tests: HTML document loads with correct title 'ChurnGuard AI - Predict Churn Before It Happens'
Frontend service runs without compilation errors
External preview URL shows proper error page when unavailable
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: React app is not mounting/rendering. The JavaScript bundle loads but React components don't appear in DOM. Possible issues: 1) React 18 createRoot API compatibility, 2) JavaScript execution error preventing mounting, 3) Missing dependencies or build configuration issue. Need to debug why ReactDOM.createRoot() is not working.
